lore.english:
The founder of Nomad. The first vampire.

Being the first vampire means that he was born a vampire, unlike a human who is turned into one. He is immortal, with no known weaknesses that are likely to appear in lore, and can even walk in sunlight. He is also known as the "Daywalker". 

He can transform into mist or dust and can turn humans into vampires by sucking their blood. He also has an ability called "Energy Drain", with which he absorbs the life energy of any living thing he touches.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&ATK] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase ATK of Balanced allies by 15% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase ATK of Balanced allies by 15% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Dark Sphere[-]
skills.description:
Sends a wave of dark energy at the enemy, attacking 5 times.
Removes [V3:660102] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] from the target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:660102]%[-] chance on the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
skills.description_readable:
Sends a wave of dark energy at the enemy, attacking 5 times.
Removes 1 Random Buff from the target at a 35% chance on the Last Attack.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Black Drain[-]
skills.description:
Attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] a total of 3 times to absorb energy.
On [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], if the character doesn't have a [&Buff], steals [V3:660202] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] from the target hit at a [&Color_Cyan][R:660202]%[-] chance.
If the enemy is alone when attacking, absorbs [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:660204]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:660204]%[-] chance.
If the enemy isn't alone when attacking, absorbs [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:660203]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:660203]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Attacks ALL enemies a total of 3 times to absorb energy.
On Last Attack, if the character doesn't have a Buff, steals 1 Random Buff from the target hit at a 25% chance.
If the enemy is alone when attacking, absorbs Turn Gauge by (15.5%) at a 55% chance.
If the enemy isn't alone when attacking, absorbs Turn Gauge by (12.5%) at a 45% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]End of Darkness[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy using his ability.
If the character's HP is [&Color_Cyan]50%[-] or more, performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:660302]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp].
If the character's HP is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], performs a strong [&Color_Cyan]([V3:660303]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp].
Removes [V3:660304] of the target’s [&Buff]s on the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKNOWHP]
skills.description_readable:
Attacks the enemy using his ability.
If the character's HP is 50% or more, performs a (15%) Life Steal.
If the character's HP is less than 50%, performs a strong (24%) Life Steal.
Removes 1 of the target’s Buffs on the Last Attack.
Damage increases in proportion to current HP.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Day Walker[-]
skills.description_readable:
On Turn Start, gains (2) Protective Shield.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_6601]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_6602]
skill_data.description:
Attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] a total of 5 times to absorb energy.
If the enemy is not alone when attacking, [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:661202]%)[-].
Defeating an enemy with this skill resets the cooldown time of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_6602].
skill_data.description_readable:
Attacks ALL enemies a total of 5 times to absorb energy.
If the enemy is not alone when attacking, DMG increases by (45%).
Defeating an enemy with this skill resets the cooldown time of Black Drain.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_6602]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_6603]
skill_data.description:
Attacks the enemy using his ability.
Reduces the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:661304]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:661304]%[-] chance on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
Steals the [&Shield] the target has [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], increases [&Shield] by [V3:661303]% [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter].
skill_data.description_readable:
Attacks the enemy using his ability.
Reduces the target's Turn Gauge by (15%) at a 75% chance on Last Attack.
Steals the Shield the target has before the attack.
If the target's HP is less than 50%, increases Shield by 100% after the attack.
